title: Adventure SMP Official Resource Pack
description: The resource pack used on the AdventureSMP.
body:
This resource pack requires optifine to function properly.

This is a resource pack is primarily used on the AdventureSMP and contains these features:

-Weapons based on the 3 dimensions

-Custom font

-Sculk mobs

-Laser weapons (netherite reskin)

-A LOT of allay textures

-Mossy cobblestone

-Mossy bricks

-Staffs

-Invisible (and more) armor

-Paintings

-Coins

-Extra skins for the "From the fog" mod/datapack

A video showing how to use some of these features will be available """""soon"""""
